g.title: query.expression:cast_type->query.datatype:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (cast_type) REFERENCES query.datatype(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.function_param_def:datatype->query.datatype:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (datatype) REFERENCES query.datatype(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.function_sig:return_type->query.datatype:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (return_type) REFERENCES query.datatype(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.record_column:column_type->query.datatype:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (column_type) REFERENCES query.datatype(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.subfield:composite_type->query.datatype:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (composite_type) REFERENCES query.datatype(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: query.subfield:subfield_type->query.datatype:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (subfield_type) REFERENCES query.datatype(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
